title: vaccinium sericeum var. elongatum
intro: Vaccinium sericeum var. elongatum, also known as the silky blueberry or elongated silky blueberry, is a variety of the Vaccinium sericeum plant, a type of shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium sericeum var. elongatum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and promote gastrointestinal health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
